subcodes.first_line: O thou who art a handmaid of God, drawn nigh unto Him! I have read thy letter and become apprised of its meanings. Its contents are replete with devotion unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله المقربه نامه خواندم و بر معانی اطلاع یافتم مضمون مشحون تبتل الی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @importance of prayer, @equality of men and women, @spiritual transformation
